name: Change ofHands Behind Back
preceding_figure_names: American Spin, Catapult, Change of Hands Behind Back, Change of Places Left to Right, Chugging, Fallaway Throwaway, Hip Bump, Rolling Off the Arm, Shoulder Spin, Simple Spin, Spanish Arms, Stop and Go
following_figure_names: Link, Change of Places Left to Right, Change of Hands Behind Back, Hip Bump, American Spin (from L to R hand hold), Stop and Go
notes:
Variation: use of hands:
5: place lady's RH on R side of waist.
6: release L to R hand hold, allowing lady's R hand to trail around waist.
catch L to R hand hold at the end of turn.

steps.action: Start in Open Position, perform Link LR (no turn)
Forward chasse LRL towards lady's right side, lead lady with right hand

Turning chasse RLR to end on right foot, take both hands behind back on count 6, place lady's right hand into left hand behind back on count 7, release right hand hold and extend left arm forward to open position on count 8
comments: Place lady's RH on R side of waist.
Release L to R hand hold, allowing lady's R hand to trail around waist.
Catch L to R hand hold at the end of turn.

steps.action: Start in Open Position, perform Link RL (no turn)
Forward chasse RLR towards man's right side, 1/8 turn to R over counts 3-5
Turning chass LRL to end on left foot, return to Open Position
